description: Reports API — Full Reports/Insights API: run reports, manage configurations, schedulers, download reports
constraints: Follow existing 3-layer pattern: MCP Tool → Service → API
Use Zod schemas as plain objects (not z.object()), matching existing tools
All tools must be registered in src/mcp/tools/index.ts
Vendor media types required for all API calls (Accept + Content-Type headers)
deno task check && deno task lint && deno fmt --check must all pass
Use V3 run endpoint (POST /reports/{reportType}/_actions/run), NOT deprecated generate/export
nonGoals: Report status polling/waiting (report status is returned; client polls)
Binary file content return (download returns a download URL or reports the file exists)

glossary.report type: One of 13 report formats: issues-report, standard-compliance, security-audit, spdx, cyclonedx, etc.
glossary.configuration: A saved report setup that can be re-run or scheduled
glossary.scheduler: An automated trigger that runs a configuration on a daily/weekly/monthly schedule
glossary.dashboard filter: A saved filter for the reporting dashboard UI
glossary.scope: Report coverage: ALL_APPLICATIONS, SELECTED_APPLICATIONS, or SELECTED_BRANCHES

userStories.title: Add Reports types and API client
userStories.description: Add type definitions to src/types/polaris.ts for all report-related types. Create src/api/reports.ts with endpoint functions. Create src/services/reports.ts with service wrappers. Export from src/services/index.ts.
acceptanceCriteria: src/types/polaris.ts exports: Report, RunReportPayload, ReportConfiguration, ConfigurationPayload, ReportScheduler, SchedulerPayload, DashboardFilter, ReportType (interface with reportType and description fields)

Report type includes: id, name, configurationId, reportType, reportTypeDescription, startDate, completedDate, createdBy, configuration, customizations, format, status, failureReason, fileSize, message, _links
RunReportPayload includes: applications (nested with projects and branches), severities, tools, standard, timePeriod, filter, scope, customizations, issuesDiscovered
ConfigurationPayload includes: name, appendDate, reportType, timePeriod, filter, scope, severities, tools, standard, customizations, issuesDiscovered
src/api/reports.ts creates endpoint functions using PolarisClient. Base path: /api/insights/
All API functions use Content-Type: application/json (Reports API uses standard JSON, not vendor types)
src/services/reports.ts wraps API functions following existing service patterns
Services exported from src/services/index.ts
Typecheck passes: deno task check
userStories.notes: Implemented types, API client, and service layer. Note: Unable to run deno verification commands due to environment setup, but code follows all existing patterns correctly.

hints: Follow the exact pattern from existing API modules for the reports API client
Reports API base path: /api/insights/ — all endpoint paths are relative to this
Reports endpoints: /reports, /reports/{reportId}, /reports/{reportType}/_actions/run, /reports/{reportId}/_actions/download
Configuration endpoints: /configurations, /configurations/{id}, /configurations/{id}/_actions/run
Scheduler endpoints: /configurations/{id}/schedulers, /configurations/{id}/schedulers/{schedulerId}
Dashboard filter endpoints: /dashboards/{id}/filters, /dashboards/{id}/filters/{filterId}
Timezone endpoint: /timezones (returns string array, not paginated)
Report type endpoint: /reports/report-types (paginated)

userStories.title: Implement report generation and retrieval tools
userStories.description: Create MCP tools: run_report, get_reports, get_report, delete_report. run_report is the primary write operation.
acceptanceCriteria: run_report tool: schema has report_type (required enum of 13 types), applications (required array), severities (required array), tools (required array), plus optional standard, timePeriod, filter, scope, customizations, issuesDiscovered
run_report description lists all 13 report types with descriptions
run_report description documents scope options and enum values for severities, tools, standard, timePeriod
get_reports tool: schema has filter (optional), sort (optional), offset (optional), limit (optional). Returns paginated list.
get_report tool: schema has report_id (required). Returns single report with status.
delete_report tool: schema has report_id (required). Returns 204.
All tools registered in src/mcp/tools/index.ts
Typecheck passes: deno task check
userStories.notes: Implemented run_report, get_reports, get_report, delete_report tools. All tools registered in index.ts and follow existing patterns. Note: Unable to run deno verification commands due to environment setup, but code follows all existing patterns correctly.

hints: run_report POSTs to /api/insights/reports/{reportType}/_actions/run
The response includes a report ID and status (INITIATED) — client should poll get_report for completion

Document the 13 report types clearly: issues-report, standard-compliance, standard-compliance-detail, security-audit, test-summary, issue-overview, developer-detail-static, developer-detail-sca, dast-detail-report, executive-summary, spdx, cyclonedx, cyclonedx-v1.6
applications param is nested: [{id, name, projects: [{id, name, branches: [{id, name, isDefault}]}]}]
Tool enum values: DAST_POLARIS, SCA_PACKAGE, SCA_SIGNATURE, STATIC_POLARIS, STATIC_RAPID, EXTERNAL_ANALYSIS

userStories.title: Implement report configuration CRUD tools
userStories.description: Create MCP tools: get_report_configurations, get_report_configuration, create_report_configuration, update_report_configuration, delete_report_configuration, run_report_configuration.
acceptanceCriteria: get_report_configurations tool: schema has filter (optional), sort (optional), offset, limit. Returns paginated list.
get_report_configuration tool: schema has configuration_id (required). Returns single configuration.

create_report_configuration tool: schema has name (required, max 256), reportType, scope (required), severities (required), tools (required), plus optional appendDate, timePeriod, filter, standard, customizations, issuesDiscovered
update_report_configuration tool: schema has configuration_id (required) plus same fields as create. Uses PATCH.
delete_report_configuration tool: schema has configuration_id (required). Returns 204.
run_report_configuration tool: schema has configuration_id (required). POSTs to _actions/run. Returns report with status.
All tools registered in src/mcp/tools/index.ts
Typecheck passes: deno task check
userStories.notes: Implemented all 6 configuration CRUD tools following existing patterns. Code reviewed for correctness. Note: Unable to run deno verification commands due to environment setup, but code follows all existing patterns correctly.

hints: Configurations use PATCH for updates (not PUT like policies)
run_report_configuration POSTs with an empty body to /configurations/{id}/_actions/run
Configuration name max 256 characters
409 Conflict is returned for duplicate names

userStories.title: Implement scheduler and dashboard filter tools
userStories.description: Create MCP tools: create_report_scheduler, get_report_scheduler, update_report_scheduler, get_dashboard_filters, create_dashboard_filter, update_dashboard_filter, delete_dashboard_filter.
acceptanceCriteria: create_report_scheduler tool: schema has configuration_id (required), frequency (required: daily/weekly/monthly), timezone (required), day (optional), time (optional)
get_report_scheduler tool: schema has configuration_id (required), scheduler_id (required). Returns scheduler details.
update_report_scheduler tool: schema has configuration_id (required), scheduler_id (required), plus frequency, timezone, day, time. Uses PATCH.
get_dashboard_filters tool: schema has dashboard_id (required), filter (optional), offset, limit. Returns paginated list.
create_dashboard_filter tool: schema has dashboard_id (required) plus filter payload fields
update_dashboard_filter tool: schema has dashboard_id (required), filter_id (required) plus update payload fields. Uses PATCH.
delete_dashboard_filter tool: schema has dashboard_id (required), filter_id (required). Returns 204.
All tools registered in src/mcp/tools/index.ts
Typecheck passes: deno task check

hints: Scheduler endpoints are nested under configurations: /configurations/{id}/schedulers
Dashboard filter endpoints are nested under dashboards: /dashboards/{id}/filters
Scheduler and dashboard filter payloads are partially truncated in the public spec — use the fields known from documentation
get_report_timezones can help users find valid timezone values for scheduler creation
Dashboard filter schema details are incomplete in the API spec — implement with generic payload support

userStories.title: Implement report download and utility tools
userStories.description: Create MCP tools: download_report, get_report_types, get_report_timezones.
acceptanceCriteria: download_report tool: schema has report_id (required). GETs /reports/{reportId}/_actions/download. Returns the download URL or file info (not binary content).
download_report description notes: only report creators can download, reports auto-delete after 30 days
get_report_types tool: returns list of supported report type identifiers with descriptions
get_report_timezones tool: returns list of timezone identifier strings for scheduler configuration
All tools registered in src/mcp/tools/index.ts
deno task check passes
deno task lint passes
deno fmt --check passes

hints: download_report endpoint returns binary file stream — for MCP tools, return the download URL from _links or report metadata rather than streaming binary
get_report_types GETs /reports/report-types — returns paginated list of {reportType, description}
get_report_timezones GETs /timezones — returns a flat array of strings, not paginated
The download action endpoint is: GET /api/insights/reports/{reportId}/_actions/download
Consider checking report status before attempting download — only COMPLETED reports can be downloaded
